title: Length word problem (US customary)
description: Add and subtract lengths to solve word problems. All problems are in inches and feet.

assessment_items.question_content:
A zookeeper measured the lengths of different animals at the zoo.

Animal | Length  
- | - | -
Snake | $23 \text { inches}$ 
Lion | $60 \text { inches}$ 
Alligator |  $55 \text { inches}$ 
Otter |  $39 \text { inches}$ 

**How long are the otter and alligator combined?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{inches}$
hints:
To find how long the $\blueE{\text{otter}}$ and $\maroonD{\text{alligator}}$ are together, we need to find the total.  So, we add.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/38a44acbedb9a026eedadbbace9bfd733b44508e)

$\blueE{39}\text{ inches}  + \maroonD{55}\text{ inches} =\purpleD{\square}\text{ inches}$

Let's add to find the total.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f5fb39e000ccca5c16c6a6fc838f39ef5a94e115)

$\blueE{39}\text{ inches}  + \maroonD{55}\text{ inches} =\purpleD{94}\text{ inches}$
The otter and alligator measure $\maroonD{94}\text{ in}$ combined.

assessment_items.question_content:
A clown has a silly string that is  $25$ $\text{in}$ long and a magic scarf that is $48$ $\text{in}$ long.

**How long are the clown's silly string and magic scarf combined?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{in}$
hints:
To find how long the $\blueE{\text{silly string}}$ and $\maroonD{\text{magic scarf}}$ are together, we need to find the total.  So, we add.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/88ce97fc5fb6719a1bc34395627d4226cd3b31cd)

$\blueE{25}\text{ inches}  + \maroonD{48}\text{ inches} =\purpleD{\square}\text{ inches}$

Let's add to find the total.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bea76abc47d652b23d0dc7801dd455aaf4c88ff3)

$\blueE{25}\text{ inches}  + \maroonD{48}\text{ inches} =\purpleD{73}\text{ inches}$
The silly string and magic scarf combined are $\purpleD{73}\text{ in}$ long.

assessment_items.question_content:
Tony measures the height of each of his plants.  

Plant | Height  
- | - | -
Tomato | $32 \text { in}$ 
Pepper | $29 \text { in}$ 
Corn |  $72 \text { in}$ 

**What is the height of Tony's tomato and pepper plant combined?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{in}$
hints:
To find how tall the $\blueE{\text{tomato}}$ and $\maroonD{\text{pepper}}$ are together, we need to find the total.  So, we add.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c098ac1dfc38a39a08d23355121032094ed1eca9)

$\blueE{32}\text{ inches}  + \maroonD{29}\text{ inches} =\purpleD{\square}\text{ inches}$

Let's add to find the total.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0313d9f2b10643efc17529e0b2a8b521739da6e1)

$\blueE{32}\text{ inches}  + \maroonD{29}\text{ inches} =\purpleD{61}\text{ inches}$
The tomato and pepper plant measure $\purpleD{61}\text{ in}$ combined.

assessment_items.question_content:
Harry and his wizard friends measured the lengths of their broomsticks.

Friend | Length  
- | - | -
Harry | $59 \text { inches}$ 
Ron | $54 \text { inches}$ 
Hermione |  $61 \text { inches}$ 
Ginny |  $56 \text { inches}$ 

**How much longer is Hermione's broomstick than Ginny's broomstick?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{inches}$
hints:
To find how much longer $\purpleD{\text{Hermione's broomstick}}$ is compared to $\blueE{\text{Ginny's broomstick}}$, we need to find the difference.  So, we subtract.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f49a9dffc0b5b5bbcfb7ae7955920b47c8fc3738)

$\purpleD{61}\text{ inches} - \blueE{56}\text{ inches}  = \maroonD{\square}\text{ inches} $

Let's subtract to find the difference.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/07d8830cbf3e689233ec23e03b3172ced73fa8f5)

$\purpleD{61}\text{ inches}  - \blueE{56}\text{ inches}  = \maroonD{5}\text{ inches} $
Hermione's broomstick is $\maroonD{5} \text{ in}$ longer than Ginny's broomstick.

assessment_items.question_content:
Pilar has $85$ inches of ribbon. She gives her friend, Nico, $19$ inches of the ribbon.

**How much ribbon does Pilar have left?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{inches}$
hints:
To find how much ribbon $\purpleD{\text{Pilar}}$ has left, we need to subtract the amount of ribbon she gave to $\blueE{\text{Nico}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b330486ab3da0201bc4d5278adc0cc9e0c31a9f6)

$\purpleD{85}\text{ inches} - \blueE{19}\text{ inches}  = \maroonD{\square}\text{ inches} $

Let's subtract to find the difference.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f2fe133ed93daf25da9cbc59f7497f3d6b464a02)

$\purpleD{85}\text{ inches}  - \blueE{19}\text{ inches}  = \maroonD{66}\text{ inches}$
Pilar has $\maroonD{66} \text{ in}$ of ribbon left.

assessment_items.question_content:
Olaf measured his arm and nose to see how long they were. The carrot for his nose measures $7$ inches long. The branch for his arm measures $24$ inches long.

**How much longer is Olaf's arm than his nose?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{inches}$
hints:
To find the difference, we start with the length of $\purpleD{\text{Olaf's arm}}$ and subtract the length of the $\blueE{\text{Olaf's nose}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/51bb1c708299efff4c5643bb3dd9415aa0a0b0ea)

$\purpleD{24} \text { inches}-\blueE{7} \text { inches}= \maroonD{\Large\Box} \text{ inches}$

Let's subtract to find the difference.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3d7ce405a8ed06bbb5893f6cd083bc3c1682dac7)

$\purpleD{24}\text{ inches}  - \blueE{7}\text{ inches}  = \maroonD{17}\text{ inches} $
Olaf's arm is $\maroonD{17}\text{ in}$ longer than his nose.

assessment_items.question_content:
Woody has a lasso that is $11\text{ ft}$ long. Bo Peep has a lasso that is $23\text{ ft}$ longer than Woody's.  

**How long is Bo Peep's lasso?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ft}$
hints:
To find how long $\purpleD{\text{Bo Peep's lasso}}$ is, we need to add $\blueE{\text{Woody's lasso}}$ with the $\maroonD{\text{extra length}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86ddbe6ee2e6798deb1776194e57670075ede1c6)

$\blueE{11}\text{ feet}  + \maroonD{23}\text{ feet} =\purpleD{\square}\text{ feet}$

Let's add to find the total.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b696c1a88ef65beb3ee63a6ba61c68319c7dbec7)


$\blueE{11}\text{ feet}  + \maroonD{23}\text{ feet} =\purpleD{34}\text{ feet}$
Bo Peep's lasso is $\purpleD{34}\text{ ft}$ long.

assessment_items.question_content:
Nancy measures the heights of different trees in the forest.

Tree | Height
- | - | -
Maple | $52 \text { ft}$ 
Red pine | $75 \text { ft}$ 
Aspen |  $39 \text { ft}$ 

**What is the height of the Maple tree and Aspen tree combined?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ft}$
hints:
To find how tall the $\blueE{\text{Maple tree}}$ and $\maroonD{\text{Aspen tree}}$ are together, we need to find the total.  So, we add.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ecfb5fbb77739efa0c6f5425fc845becb398eb3a)

$\blueE{52}\text{ feet}  + \maroonD{39}\text{ feet} =\purpleD{\square}\text{ feet}$

Let's add to find the total.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d74d805eca7f477fac4bc355bf21bccd3d048657)


$\blueE{52}\text{ feet}  + \maroonD{39}\text{ feet} =\purpleD{91}\text{ feet}$
The maple and aspen tree measure $\purpleD{91}\text{ ft}$ combined.

assessment_items.question_content:
Moana measures the lengths of the different boats on her island.

Boat | Length
- | - | -
Canoe | $18 \text { ft}$ 
Sailboat | $46 \text { ft}$ 
Double canoe |  $55 \text { ft}$ 

**What is the length of the canoe and double canoe combined?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ft}$
hints:
To find how long the $\blueE{\text{Canoe}}$ and $\maroonD{\text{Double canoe}}$ are together, we need to find the total.  So, we add.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/af5bf84be966e3159327f4874c59c7a7da248775)

$\blueE{18}\text{ feet}  + \maroonD{55}\text{ feet} =\purpleD{\square}\text{ feet}$

Let's add to find the total.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/905c8978f4bb4f7d315c90f5a979137ae09ef018)


$\blueE{18}\text{ feet}  + \maroonD{55}\text{ feet} =\purpleD{73}\text{ feet}$
The canoe and double canoe measure $\purpleD{73}\text{ ft}$ combined.

assessment_items.question_content:
A water pipe under a palace is $59$ $\text{ft}$ long. A water pipe under a house is $36$ $\text{ft}$ long.  

**What is the difference in the lengths of the two water pipes?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ft}$
hints:
To find the difference in the pipe lengths, we start with the length of the $\purpleD{\text{palace pipe}}$ and subtract the length of the $\blueE{\text{house pipe}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/16b87c072da3865e8a9420bfcf4afd20d2f2d49d)

$\purpleD{59} \text { ft}-\blueE{36} \text { ft}= \maroonD{\Large\Box} \text{ ft}$

Let's subtract to find the difference.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/908d29bc223e1fc6c07cd2ee0f09e0e8c75a9fed)

$\purpleD{59}\text{ ft}  - \blueE{36}\text{ ft}  = \maroonD{23}\text{ ft}$
The difference in the lengths of the pipes is $\maroonD{23}\text{ ft}$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Milo is cutting down part of a tree to make firewood. The tree is $74\text{ feet}$ tall.  He decides to cut off part of the tree so it is now only $39\text{ feet}$.  

**How many feet did Milo cut off of the tree?**
  
[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ft}$
hints:
To find how many feet Milo cut, we start with the $\purpleD{\text{tree length}}$ and subtract the $\blueE{\text{new tree length}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aba4c6e2784544bcabacb11d46b06d0d82bb1acb)

$\purpleD{74} \text { ft}-\blueE{39} \text { ft}= \maroonD{\Large\Box} \text{ ft}$

Let's subtract to find the difference.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fa286a9ac4af811f230ddfe259e51d39d2b75958)

$\purpleD{74}\text{ ft}  - \blueE{39}\text{ ft}  = \maroonD{35}\text{ ft}$
Milo cut $\maroonD{35}\text{ ft}$ off the tree.

assessment_items.question_content:
The lengths of different sea animals are listed below.

Animal | Length
- | - | -
Elephant seal | $22 \text { ft}$ 
Whale shark |  $61 \text { ft}$ 
Giant squid | $39 \text { ft}$ 

**What is the difference in the length between the whale shark and giant squid?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 4]] $\text{ft}$
hints:
To find the difference in lengths, we start with the length of the $\purpleD{\text{whale shark}}$ and subtract the length of the $\blueE{\text{giant squid}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1223c302ce8fa1001a7d22e3ff3ec1138d51a3b7)

$\purpleD{61} \text { ft}-\blueE{39} \text { ft}= \maroonD{\Large\Box} \text{ ft}$

Let's subtract to find the difference.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ce5009c47f0d69b23272b352cbfb8df36ded42d6)

$\purpleD{61}\text{ ft}  - \blueE{39}\text{ ft}  = \maroonD{22}\text{ ft}$
The whale shark is $\maroonD{22}\text{ ft}$ longer than the giant squid.
